overall.description: A first-person walk along a rain-soaked rooftop walkway in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The scene features heavy fog, neon lighting, and modern industrial architecture with steam vents and illuminated building facades. The footage is from a video game engine, likely Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway with industrial steam vent

events.description: passing the large cylindrical steam vent structure on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet rooftop pathway toward the illuminated steam vent

entered.detail: large industrial cylindrical structure emitting thick yellow-orange steam into the foggy air
tall pole with multiple floodlights illuminating the area with cool white light
tall building with illuminated vertical slit windows and industrial metal facade
wet concrete path with rain puddles reflecting the ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk rooftop at night, with the camera walking toward a large cylindrical steam vent emitting yellow-orange smoke. A futuristic office tower with illuminated windows looms on the right, while a tall multi-head street lamp stands in the distance on the left. The concrete walkway is wet with rain, reflecting the artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rooftop corridor between futuristic buildings

events.description: large steam vent structure passes out of view behind the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway alongside the building with glowing vertical windows

segments.scene_description: Having passed the steam vent, the camera now walks alongside the illuminated facade of the futuristic office tower, which dominates the right side of the frame. The street lamp on the left grows larger as the walkway continues between the structures. The heavy rain and fog persist, creating a moody atmosphere with reflections on the wet concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop walkway with prominent street lighting

events.description: approaching the bright multi-head street lamp which becomes a dominant light source on the left

agents.ego_description: walking past the multi-head street lamp while continuing along the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera passing close by the tall multi-head street lamp on the left, which now provides bright illumination. The office tower recedes into the distance on the right as the walkway continues forward. The persistent rain creates a hazy glow around the street lamp, enhancing the cyberpunk atmosphere of the empty rooftop passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk across a rain-soaked cyberpunk rooftop that shifts from a hazy industrial vista to a brightly lit urban passage. It begins by moving through dense fog toward a large cylindrical steam vent emitting yellow-orange smoke, with a glowing office tower looming to the right and a distant street lamp to the left. As the camera passes the vent, the perspective shifts to track alongside the illuminated facade of the office tower, which dominates the frame while the wet concrete reflects the surrounding neon lights. The scene then opens up as the camera draws close to the tall multi-head street lamp, whose bright glow pierces through the persistent rain and haze. Finally, the office tower recedes into the distance on the right as the camera continues forward along the empty, shimmering walkway.
